fields.name: Table Name
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the name of the table to which the comment applies.
The name can be one of the following tables:
Contact

Web Source

Campaign

Sales Cycle

Sales Cycle Stage

Opportunity

To-do


The table name is entered automatically according to the card from which you enter the comment.

This field is used internally.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Sub No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the stage within the sales cycle.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
This field is used internally. Specifies the line number of the comment.
When you create a comment for a card, the program automatically enters a line number in the Line No. field to keep track of all the comments in the Relationship Management Comment Line table. The line number is specific to the particular comment.

fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date the comment was created.

fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the comment.

fields.name: Last Date Modified
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date the comment was last modified.
When you change information in the Rlshp. Mgt. Comment Line table, the program automatically updates the Last Date Modified field.
